title: Tree Vein miner Enchantment
description: adds a tree veinminer enchantment for axes, allowing you to instantly mine entire trees with a single click!
body:
# Tree Vein Miner

> adds a **Tree Veinminer enchantment** for axes, allowing you to instantly mine entire trees with a single click! ## Features - Custom enchantment that can be applied to axes - Enchantment book can be crafted **Recipe** - Craft a **Tree Veinminer Enchanted Book** by combining: - Any enchanted book - 1 Netherite ingot > ![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84d178a2b2887ecd8b525ad1dbdce6fd8162c712.png) - Place both items in a crafting table (no specific pattern required) - Use an anvil to apply the book to an axe ## How to Use 1. **Obtain an Enchanted Book:** - Craft: Enchanted book + Netherite ingot - Result: Tree Veinminer enchanted book 2. **Enchant Your Axe:** - Place your axe and the Tree Veinminer book in an anvil - The axe is now enchanted with Veinminer 3. **Mine Trees:** - Hold the enchanted axe - Break any log in a tree - The entire tree will be instantly mined! ## Notes - Leaves will also be broken when mining with Veinminer
